race.comment: STREAK OF GOD (4) was solid on debut from a midfield position and looks ready to fire second-up and out in trip. Pike hopping on board now is a big push for his chances and the winkers go on as well. Looks set to raise the bar now. CARENTAN (6) has been right in the finish his past couple, missing by 0.5L two back before a 1.3L defeat when over 1705m most recently. He's ticked the distance box today and he too gets the winkers on for the first time. Draw is sticky, but the form out of her last start has been good and she can play a leading role. VAMPI QUEEN (12)just missed here two back as favourite before a 3L defeat when on the quick turnaround at Ascot over the mile. She rises in trip again here for Chris Parnham and she has to be included on her recent efforts. LA NOCCIOLA (11) is knocking on the door and won't be far away once again. BILLIONAIRE'S ROW (8) gets the blinkers on here and looks a sharp improver.
